getAgentId(bytes32).notice: Returns the soulbound token ID for a given agent key (0 = not registered)

getHumanNullifier(uint256).notice: Returns the nullifier hash — proves uniqueness without revealing identity

hasHumanProof(uint256).notice: Returns true if the agent has any human proof attached (including expired)

isVerifiedAgent(bytes32).notice: Returns true if the agent has a valid, non-expired ZK human proof
